name: US Money Express Co
description_short: US Money Express Co offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services from their Brooklyn location with extended weekday hours.
description_long: US Money Express Co is a check-cashing service located at 167 Greenpoint Ave in Brooklyn, NY 11222. The company has been operating as a financial services provider in the Greenpoint neighborhood, serving the local community's immediate cash and payment needs. Based on available information, the company provides essential financial services for customers who need quick access to funds or payment processing without traditional banking relationships. US Money Express Co offers check cashing as their primary service, alongside money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options. These services are designed for customers who prefer in-person transactions and need rapid fund availability. The company maintains regular business hours, operating Monday through Friday from 9:30 AM to 6:00 PM and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM, providing extended access compared to traditional bank hours. What distinguishes US Money Express Co is their neighborhood presence and direct phone accessibility at (718) 349-1320, allowing customers to verify requirements before visiting. Their Saturday morning hours extend service availability to customers who cannot visit during weekday business hours. The company's Greenpoint location serves a diverse urban population with varying banking preferences and access needs. An honest assessment reveals that US Money Express Co operates in the check-cashing category, which typically involves fees for their services. Customers should expect to pay transaction fees for check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers, which are standard in this industry. While specific fee structures are not listed on their Waze profile, prospective customers should call ahead to understand exact costs before using their services. The company's reliance on a single physical location may limit convenience for customers outside the immediate Brooklyn area.
pros: Extended weekday hours (9:30 AM–6:00 PM) provide access beyond typical 9-5 banking
Saturday morning service (9:00 AM–3:00 PM) accommodates working customers
Direct phone line (718-349-1320) for advance questions about services and fees
Multiple services in one location: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
Established neighborhood presence in Greenpoint, Brooklyn
No banking relationship required to access services
cons: Single physical location limits accessibility for customers outside Brooklyn
Typical check-cashing fees apply—specific rates not disclosed on available profile
Limited information available about service speed or processing times
No online or mobile service options mentioned
Limited hours on Saturday (closes at 3:00 PM) compared to weekdays
best_for: Greenpoint Brooklyn residents who need same-day check cashing or money orders
Unbanked or underbanked customers preferring in-person financial transactions
Customers needing weekend access to check-cashing services
diagnosis: US Money Express Co is best for Greenpoint residents and unbanked customers who need immediate check cashing, money orders, or wire transfer services with flexible hours including weekends. The primary caveat is that check-cashing services typically involve transaction fees, and customers should confirm exact rates by calling (718) 349-1320 before visiting.
